LanguageData.Ammo_Shotgun_Buck.label: shotgun shell (Buck)
LanguageData.Ammo_Shotgun_Buck.description: Extremely common shotgun caliber used in almost every application, from hunting and riot control to military firearms.
LanguageData.Ammo_Shotgun_Slug.label: shotgun shell (Slug)
LanguageData.Ammo_Shotgun_Slug.description: Extremely common shotgun caliber used in almost every application, from hunting and riot control to military firearms.

LanguageData.Ammo_Shotgun_Beanbag.description: Extremely common shotgun caliber used in almost every application, from hunting and riot control to military firearms.
LanguageData.Ammo_Shotgun_ElectroSlug.label: shotgun shell (EMP)
LanguageData.Ammo_Shotgun_ElectroSlug.description: Extremely common shotgun caliber used in almost every application, from hunting and riot control to military firearms.
